title: AN ACT EXPANDING AND UPGRADING THE ELVIN MASIGAN MUNICIPAL HOSPITAL IN STA. MARIA, ISABELA, FROM A TEN-BED CAPACITY MUNICIPAL HOSPITAL INTO A TWENTY-FIVE-BED CAPACITY DISTRICT HOSPITAL, TO BE KNOWN AS THE ELVIN MASIGAN DISTRICT HOSPITAL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
H. NO. 5252 / 88 OG No. 22, 3273 (June 1, 1992)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7388, April 10, 1992 ]

AN ACT EXPANDING AND UPGRADING THE ELVIN MASIGAN MUNICIPAL HOSPITAL IN STA. MARIA, ISABELA, FROM A TEN-BED CAPACITY MUNICIPAL HOSPITAL INTO A TWENTY-FIVE-BED CAPACITY DISTRICT HOSPITAL, TO BE KNOWN AS THE ELVIN MASIGAN DISTRICT HOSPITAL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The Elvin Masigan Municipal Hospital in Sta. Maria, Isabela, is hereby expanded and upgraded from a ten-bed capacity municipal hospital into a twenty-five-bed capacity district hospital, to be known as the Elvin Masigan District Hospital.

SEC. 2. The amount necessary to carry out the provisions of this Act shall be included in the General Appropriations Act of the year following its enactment into law and thereafter.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) NEPTALI A. GONZALES

(Sgd.)

RAMON V. MITRA

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on September 4, 1091 and January 23, 1992, respectively.

(Sgd.)

ANACLETO D. BADOY, JR.

(Sgd.)

CAMILO L. SABIO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: April 10, 1992

(Sgd.)

CORAZON C. AQUINO

President of the Philippines
